title: White Tongue in HIV Patients: The Top 8 Herbal Teas
description: Silybum marianum teas have been traditionally used to help with white tongue, a condition characterized by a white coating on the tongue. This is due to the presence of certain properties and constituents in the plant, such as silymarin and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. These compounds help to reduce inflammation and kill off bacteria that can cause the white coating, promoting a healthy environment in the mouth.  To try Silybum marianum teas for w...
